basics.name: Diego Alejandro Rueda Cadavid
basics.summary: Environmental Engineer, M.Sc. Physics and M.Sc. Environmental Sciences. PhD candidate in Chemical Engineering at UFSC (Brazil), working on functional materials and catalysis for hydrogen production and oxygen transport.

work.summary: Professor of various courses in the Environmental Engineering undergraduate program.

work.company: National University of Colombia (Department of Physics)
work.summary: Auxiliary professor of various undergraduate physics courses.
Design and definition of technical criteria and terms of reference for the selection of hardware, software and photovoltaic power systems.
Research internship as laboratory technician, methane / greenhouse-gas research.

education.institution: Federal University of Santa Catarina (UFSC), Brazil
education.area: Chemical Engineering — new catalytic materials for hydrogen production and oxygen transport
Physics of materials, solid state and modeling of materials for environmental applications
Modeling and estimation of greenhouse gases and their radiative effects on the atmosphere
Synthesis and characterization of TiO2 for catalytic applications and photocatalysis

publications.name: Ni-induced lattice distortion and oxygen vacancy engineering in La0.5Ca0.5Mn1-xFe0.5NixO3 for visible-light ethanol photoreforming hydrogen production
publications.publisher: Submitted to the International Journal of Hydrogen Energy
publications.summary: Ni substitution drives lattice distortion and oxygen-vacancy formation, enhancing visible-light photoreforming of ethanol for hydrogen production. (Submitted)

publications.name: Research Trends and Technological Insights on Double Perovskites for Hydrogen Production and Storage: A Bibliometric and Text-Mining Analysis
publications.summary: Bibliometric and text-mining analysis of the research landscape and technological trends of double perovskites for hydrogen production and storage. (In preparation)

publications.name: Effect of Ni/Mn cationic disorder on the structural and magnetic properties of La2NiMnO6, La2NiFeO6 and La2NiMnCoO6 double perovskites synthesized by sol-gel for hydrogen photoreforming
publications.summary: Effect of Ni/Mn cationic disorder on the structural and magnetic properties of sol-gel double perovskites for hydrogen photoreforming. (In preparation)

publications.name: Evidence of multifunctional properties of ferromanganite La0.5Ca0.5Mn0.5Fe0.5O3
publications.summary: Crystallographic, electrical and magnetic study revealing the multifunctional behaviour of the ferromanganite La0.5Ca0.5Mn0.5Fe0.5O3.

publications.name: Low-cost tangerine peel waste mediated production of Titanium Dioxide Nanocrystals: Synthesis and characterization
publications.summary: Green, low-cost route to TiO2 nanocrystals using tangerine (Citrus reticulata) peel waste as a mediating agent.

publications.name: Spatial and temporal variation of methane emissions in the coastal Balearic Sea, Western Mediterranean
publications.summary: Quantification of spatial and temporal variability of dissolved methane and sea-air methane fluxes in the coastal Balearic Sea.

presentations.name: Communities and evolution of double perovskite in hydrogen production and storage: A Bibliometric Analysis
